name: localmodel.run
description: Check whether a computer or phone can run a given local LLM, and which tool to use, across macOS, Windows, Linux, iOS and Android.

capabilities.name: check_compatibility
capabilities.description: Given a model id and a device id, return whether the device can run the model, the recommended quantization, estimated memory, and the install command.

model.description: Model slug (e.g. llama-3.1-8b). See values_url for the full list.

device.description: Device slug (e.g. macbook-pro-m3-16gb). See values_url for the full list.

capabilities.name: list_models
capabilities.description: List all tracked local LLMs with parameter counts and GGUF quant sizes.

capabilities.name: list_devices
capabilities.description: List all tracked devices with memory and usable-memory figures.

data_license: CC BY 4.0 with attribution to localmodel.run
disclaimer: Memory figures are estimates. See https://localmodel.run/methodology
